Added_Other.name: DFFlagEnableOverridingAndroidExitReasonsAsSuccess
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows developers to define custom exit reasons for Android apps.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves user experience by providing clearer feedback on app exits.

Added_Other.mechanism: Allows simulation of parent objects in a more efficient way.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance, making experiences run more smoothly for players.

Added_Physics.mechanism: Updates the way humanoid scaling data is cached.
Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances the accuracy and responsiveness of character size adjustments in the game.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagTriangleMeshPartDefaultCollisionGeometry
Added_Physics.mechanism: Changes the default collision settings for triangle mesh parts to improve performance.
Added_Physics.purpose: Reduces lag and improves game performance, leading to a smoother experience for players.
